name: Ao'yin

skills.name: Hidden Dragon
skills.description: The Dragon Souls from his last 2 skill uses grant effects to his Basic Attacks, which deal physical damage to up to two enemies. He gains 1 mark upon using skills, for up to 3 marks. Basic Attacks expend all marks for various effects, striking once per mark.

skills.name: Flaming Palm
skills.description: Deals physical damage and true damage. Attaches a Fire Dragon Soul to his sword. Basic Attacks deal more damage when this Soul is attached. Enhanced Basic Attacks will deal both physical damage and true damage.

skills.name: Downpour
skills.description: Deals physical damage and recovers Health upon hit. Attaches a Water Dragon Soul to his sword. Basic Attacks restore Health and Mana when this Soul is attached. Enhanced Basic Attacks will deal physical damage and restore Health, but restore less for hits on non-hero units.

skills.name: Riding the Wind
skills.description: Gains Movement Speed that diminishes over time, deals physical damage, and knocks back enemies. Attaches a Wind Dragon Soul to his sword. Gains Movement Speed while this Soul is attached, 50% extra if on both swords. Enhanced Basic Attacks will deal physical damage and knock back enemies.

tips: Ao'yin is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 48.4% win rate and 1.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Eternity Blade → Boots of Dexterity → Shadow Ripper → Daybreaker's Virtue → Doomsday → Overlord's Might.
Run Penetration for stats that match Ao'yin's Marksman kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Flaming Palm → Downpour → Riding the Wind → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
Teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
Ao'yin excels into Liu Bei, Athena, Zilong. Avoid blind picking into Kaizer, Dun, Arthur without team peel.

Ao'yin is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 5.1% — expect Ao'yin to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.question: Is Ao'yin good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Ao'yin is Tier S+ Marksman with 48.4% win rate, 1.6% pick rate, and 5.1% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Strong meta pick for ranked.

faqs.question: What is the best Ao'yin build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Lightfoot Shoes, Eternity Blade, Boots of Dexterity, Shadow Ripper, Daybreaker's Virtue, Doomsday. Run Penetration arcana with Flash & Execute. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Ao'yin?
faqs.answer: Pick Kaizer, Dun, Arthur into Ao'yin. Deny Farm Lane resources early and force fights before Ao'yin completes core items. Ao'yin struggles when the enemy can dive and burst them.

faqs.question: Who does Ao'yin counter?
faqs.answer: Ao'yin is strong into Liu Bei, Athena, Zilong according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Ao'yin when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Farm Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Ao'yin good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Ao'yin is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 5.1% — expect Ao'yin to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.question: What lane should Ao'yin play?
faqs.answer: Ao'yin is tagged Farm Lane in Camp export (Marksman). Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Ao'yin?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Penetration arcana. Battle spell: Flash & Execute. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Ao'yin or Hou Yi — which is better?
faqs.answer: Ao'yin vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Hou Yi wins 0.9% more often globally. Choose Ao'yin when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Ao'yin?
faqs.answer: Yes in tryhard queues — 5.1% ban rate. Deny if enemy first-picks Marksman.
